audit_items.proof_trace: Error cleanup path only calls kfree(prtd) but leaks prtd->graph when q6apm_graph_open succeeded. Four constraint-check error paths after successful graph allocation don't call q6apm_graph_close.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Repeated device open attempts with invalid hardware parameters cause q6apm_graph_open allocations to leak, leading to memory exhaustion.
